query:
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS order_count,
  SUM(total) AS total_revenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('delivered', 'paid') THEN total ELSE 0 END) AS paid_delivered_revenue,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status IN ('delivered', 'paid') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS paid_delivered_count
FROM orders
WHERE created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-03-01'
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month;
